titleStmt.title: SII 37.370: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 370. (A.R. No. B 15 of 1941-42.) Mācherla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: Slab set up in the field of Mahaboob Sahib, teacher in the local Government School.
This is dated Śaka 1448 Vyaya, Kārttīka śu. 2, Sunday, corresponding to 1527 A.D., October 27. The Śaka year was expired.

It records the grant of land at Mācherla in the Nāgārjunakoṇḍa-sīma made by Kōnapa-Nāyuḍu, son of Koṇḍapa Kūnapu-Nāyuḍu, the Kāryakartta of Triyaṁbakasurayya, who was the governor of Koṇḍavīḍu, for the daily offerings to the temples of the gods Ishṭa-Kāmēśvara and Vīrēśvara of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
va¨rṣaṁbulu
1448 Agunēṭi vyaya saṁvatsara kātrika śu 2 [A]
maṁnmahārāya kriṣṇarāyadēvamahārāyalu pṛ
dhvirājyamu sēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu vāri Ājñanu
koṁḍavīḍu yēli triyaṁbakarusayya vā
ri kāryaka¨rttalaina koṁḍḍakūnapu nāyini
kumāruṁḍu kōnapanāyiniṁgāru nā
gā¨rjunikoṁḍḍaśīmalō mā¨rcelanu vūri pū
¨rpu rāvipāṭi muttinēni tōṁṭapaṭṭu yi
ṣṭakāmēśvarunikinni vīrēśvarunikinni Amṛ
tapaḷa kūragāyalakunnu pūja pu
ṣṭālakunnu triyaṁbakarusayyavā
riki puṇyaṁgānu dhārāpūrvakaṁ cēsi
Istimigāna Aṁddulaku phalaṁ Avadhariṁcēdi .
yī dha¨rmmaṁ Anukūlaṁ cēsina saṁkkaṭa
ṁbayyana yīdēvaḷa kṛpānerigi bra
tukunu yī dha¨rmānaku yavva
ru tappinānu vāra
ṇāsilō vadha cēsina dōṣānaṁbōvu
vāru .
Digital edition of SII 37.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
